stories.headline: Gracie the Giraffe, who went missing after wandering off a Texas ranch, is finally found - ABC News - Breaking News, Latest News and Videos
stories.summary: Gracie the Giraffe has finally been found in Texas

stories.headline: Prince Harry reconsidering bringing Meghan and children on UK trip - BBC
stories.summary: It comes after his request for police protection was rejected days before the family is due to arrive.

stories.headline: Jonah Hill’s ‘Cut Off’ Comedy With Kristen Wiig Still Without Release Date Amid “Unreleasable” Claim - The Hollywood Reporter
stories.summary: The Oscar nominee has previously described the film as a “classic comedy,” comparing it to 'Step Brothers,' 'Clueless' and 'Trading Places.'

stories.headline: Michelle Pfeiffer says she felt 'humiliated' following her audition for her breakthrough role in 'Grease 2' - Fox News
stories.summary: Michelle Pfeiffer reveals she felt humiliated after her "Grease 2" audition for Stephanie Zinone, struggling with singing and dancing portions.

stories.headline: Angelina Jolie's first husband Jonny Lee Miller, 53, looks completely different in rare photo with son - Yahoo
stories.summary: Jonny Lee Miller looked worlds away from his Trainspotting days in a rare photo with his teenage son Buster. See details.

stories.headline: 'Every Year After' Renewed For Season 2 With 'One Golden Summer' Plot - Deadline
stories.summary: Prime Video is going back to Barry's Bay for a second season of 'Every Year After,' likely to introduce Charlie's love interest, Alice Everly.

stories.headline: Courteney Cox and Johnny McDaid Break Up After Over 10 Years of Dating - E! News
stories.summary: Courteney Cox and Johnny McDaid, who started dating in 2013, have split after over a decade. The Friends alum and the Snow Patrol member were briefly engaged before their first breakup in 2015.

stories.headline: Vanilla Ice’s Freedom 250 Concert Abruptly Canceled “Due To Inclement Weather” - Deadline
stories.summary: Despite being one of only a few artists not to pull out of Freedom 250, the White House canceled Vanilla Ice's set at the last minute.
